meaning: n.(=corticosteroid)[鐢熷寲]鑲句笂鑵虹毊璐ㄧ被鑴傞唶
examples: Those allergic to corticoid and imidazole medicament are forbidden to use.
The local use of corticoid decreased the resistance of cornea tissue. Then fungi would be propagated.
The clock genes were strongly expressed specifically in outer layers of the adrenal gland that are responsible for corticoid production.
Even if Armstrong himself came under scrutiny in the 1999 Tour after using a cream containing a banned corticoid to combat saddle sores.
